author: @iamncdai
text: Just added D shortcut (toggle mode) for @shadcncraft. Previously there was only M, now both are available. https://t.co/GDdnN8Xyfi https://t.co/BRt5o1aXH9

included.text: I used D in shadcn/ui because it's easier to toggle with your left hand when you're debugging/inspecting with a mouse/trackpad. https://t.co/brQnvChLuR
